skills.title: Skills
skills.invalidSkillUrlSource: Skill URL currently needs to start with https://skills.sh/, https://clawhub.ai/, https://skillsmp.com/, or https://github.com/
skills.contentPlaceholder:
---
name: <skill_name> (required)
description: <skill description> (required)
metadata: { "aicraw": { "emoji": "🔧" } }
---

Skill implementation content...

# Example:
# ---
# name: cron
# description: Manage cron jobs via aicraw commands - create, query, pause, resume, delete tasks
# metadata: { "aicraw": { "emoji": "⏰" } }
# ---
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
skills.frontmatterRequired: Skills must start and end with ---
skills.editNotSupported: Edit operation is not supported by backend API
skills.editNote: Note: Backend API does not support editing skills. You can only view or toggle enable/disable status.

generalConfig.title: General Config
generalConfig.description: Configure heartbeat, display options, and language (same as aicraw init)
generalConfig.heartbeatTargetTooltip: main: do not send to channel; last: send to last conversation channel
generalConfig.activeHoursHint: Run heartbeat only during specified hours (off = run 24h)
generalConfig.showToolDetailsTooltip: Show tool call and result details in channel messages
generalConfig.languageTooltip: Language for MD templates and persona files
generalConfig.openaiApiKeyTooltip: Bearer auth for /v1/chat/completions. When set, external clients can call the OpenAI-compatible endpoint with this key. Leave empty to disable.

init.title: First-time Setup
init.securityDesc:
Aicraw is a personal assistant that runs in your own environment. It can connect to channels (DingTalk, Feishu, QQ, Discord, iMessage, etc.) and run skills that read files, run commands, and call external APIs. By default it is a single-operator boundary. A malicious or confused prompt can lead the agent to do unsafe things if tools are enabled.

If multiple people can message the same Aicraw instance with tools enabled, they share the same delegated authority (files, commands, secrets).

Recommended: Restrict which channels and users can trigger the agent; use separate config for multi-user; run skills with least privilege; review config and skills regularly.
init.configSteps: Complete the following to get started:
init.stepModelsDesc: Set API Key and model in Settings
init.afterConfigHint: After configuration, refresh the page or return here to auto-detect completion.

modelConfig.promptMessage: Chat requires an LLM model to function. Without a configured model, conversations and messages cannot be sent to the backend for processing and storage, and will be lost after a page refresh. Would you like to configure a model now?
modelConfig.chatDisabledMessage: Chat functionality is disabled because no model is configured. Please configure a model to enable chat.
modelConfig.modelNotConfigured: Please configure a model in Settings before using chat
